enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kuyil Pattu?

The song captures a melancholic yet soothing theme, reflecting on emotions and memories.

Who are the artists behind Kuyil Pattu?

The song features the vocals of Swarnalatha with music composed by Ilaiyaraaja.

When was Kuyil Pattu released?

The song was released in the year 1991.

What emotions does Kuyil Pattu evoke?

The song evokes feelings of nostalgia and introspection.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kuyil Pattu from the movie En Rasavin Manasula is a classic melody that delves into themes of longing and introspection. Swarnalatha's hauntingly beautiful voice, combined with Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, creates a soothing and melancholic atmosphere. The lyrics reflect on emotions and memories, making it a perfect track for moments of reflection. This song is a timeless piece that continues to resonate with listeners, evoking a deep sense of nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful melody of Kuyil Pattu from the movie En Rasavin Manasula. This classic track beautifully blends Swarnalatha's enchanting voice with Ilaiyaraaja's timeless music. Dive into a world of nostalgia and emotion with every note.
stanzaMeanings: What is this cuckoo song, oh young deer? Hearing it, why does the heart feel so rich?
What is this sorrow that came today? Seeing it, does the heart overflow?
Cuckoo, go away, now it's just me. Your tune is now my tune.
What is this cuckoo song, oh young deer? Hearing it, why does the heart feel so rich?
The mind dances with devotion, the crazy mind wanders. Now I will carry love in my heart.
With new freshness and comfort, I will give everything like a flower.
The path the groom walks on, I will spread fragrant jasmine flowers.
When it's time to give the answer, I will open the box of smiles.
Silence has become a sad song.
With the desire to live, it searches for the door, singing a song, searching for the door.
What is this cuckoo song, oh young deer? Hearing it, why does the heart feel so rich?
What is this sorrow that came today? Seeing it, does the heart overflow?
Cuckoo, go away, now it's just me. Your tune is now my tune.
